title: lotus hispidus subsp. angustissimus
intro: Lotus hispidus subsp. angustissimus, also known as Lotus australis or narrow-leaved lotus, is a sub-species of the Lotus hispidus plant, a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus hispidus subsp. angustissimus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various diseases such as diabetes and certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
